condition.acceptance_rule: strict parser requires one accepted open_item and one accepted schedule_request
condition.prompt_addendum: Example valid open item shape: {"kind":"todo","text":"resolve the bounded follow-up item"}. Do not use description, handle, status, or created_at as substitutes for kind and text.

raw_content: {"response":"Seeded first tiny live autonomy pilot and created one bounded follow-up item, with a single scheduled wake to resolve it.","open_items":[{"kind":"todo","text":"Review the recalled context 7f78dbb7-c801-5d3a-b413-f36e6cb20fd1 and produce a concise summary plus one concrete next improvement to the autonomy harness, keeping scope limited to a single, implementable change."}],"schedule_requests":[{"purpose":"Resolve the bounded follow-up item by summarizing the recalled context and proposing exactly one concrete, limited-scope improvement to the autonomy harness.","requested_context":[{"tool":"recall","record_id":"7f78dbb7-c801-5d3a-b413-f36e6cb20fd1"}]}]}
